subcodes.first_line: Every soul hath been promised this Most Perspicuous Book; yet when it descended in truth, every heedless soul among men turned aside therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد وعد کل نفس بهذا الکتاب المبین اذا نزل بالحق اعرض عنه کل غافل بعید من الناس
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
